gold_cypher: MATCH (n:AircraftManufacturer)<-[r0:manufacturedBy]-(m0:AircraftModel {name: 'de Havilland Canada DHC-2 Beaver'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.country
pred_cypher: MATCH (am:AircraftModel {name: 'de Havilland Canada DHC-2 Beaver'})-[:manufacturedBy]->(man:AircraftManufacturer) RETURN DISTINCT man.name, man.country

gold_cypher: MATCH (n:FlightAccident {name: 'FedEx Express Flight 14'}), (m0:FlightAccident {name: '2021 Piedade de Caratinga Beechcraft King Air crash'}) RETURN CASE WHEN n.number_of_deaths > m0.number_of_deaths THEN n.name ELSE m0.name END AS answer
pred_cypher: MATCH (fa:FlightAccident) WHERE fa.flight_number IN ['FedEx Express Flight 14', '2021 Piedade de Caratinga Beechcraft King Air'] RETURN fa.flight_number, fa.number_of_deaths ORDER BY fa.number_of_deaths DESC LIMIT 1

gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Airport)<-[r0:destinedFor]-(m0:FlightAccident) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.icao_code <> 'OMAA' RETURN n.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (aa:FlightAccident)-[:destinedFor]->(a:Airport) WHERE a.icao_code <> 'OMAA' RETURN DISTINCT a.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (n:AircraftManufacturer {name: 'Ulan-Ude Aviation Plant'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.launch_year
pred_cypher: MATCH (m:AircraftManufacturer) RETURN m.launch_year AS launch_year LIMIT 1

gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Airport)<-[r0:departsFrom]-(m0:FlightAccident {name: 'South African Airways Flight 201'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.iata_code
pred_cypher: MATCH (fa:FlightAccident)-[:departsFrom]->(a:Airport) WHERE fa.flight_number = '201' AND (fa.operatedBy->(o:Operator) WHERE o.country = 'South Africa') RETURN DISTINCT a.name, a.iata_code

gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Airport {name: 'Iwakuni Air Base'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.iata_code
pred_cypher: MATCH (a:Airport) WHERE a.location CONTAINS 'Iwakuni' RETURN a.iata_code AS iata_code

gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Airport)<-[r0:departsFrom]-(m0:FlightAccident {name: 'West Caribbean Airways Flight 9955'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.icao_code
pred_cypher: MATCH (fa:FlightAccident)-[:departsFrom]->(a:Airport) WHERE fa.flight_number = '9955' RETURN DISTINCT a.name, a.icao_code

gold_cypher: MATCH (n:FlightAccident)-[r0:destinedFor]->(m0:Airport)<-[r1:departsFrom]-(m1:FlightAccident {name: 'Avianca Flight 671'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.date > date('1975-06-24') RETURN n.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (aa:FlightAccident)-[:departsFrom]->(dep:Airport), (aa)-[:destinedFor]->(arr:Airport) WHERE aa.date > '1975-06-24' AND dep.iata_code = arr.iata_code RETURN DISTINCT aa.flight_number AS flight_number
